releaseNotes:
Daily Reminder — set a time to be nudged to log your transactions each day.

Update Checker — the app now checks for new versions automatically on launch.

Support Screen — tip jar via UPI and PayPal if you find the app useful.

Number Format — choose between Indian (1,00,000) and International (100,000) grouping.

CSV Import Feedback — import now shows how many rows were imported and how many were skipped.

Bug fixes — SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM crash on Android 12+, UPI crash on devices without UPI apps, PayPal button not opening on some devices.
